Name: 12mm Button
Description: A tactile switch that either connects a cirucuit or disconnects depending on input
Why: So you can click stuff to memorize for the minigame

Name: SH 1107 OLED
Description: Display used to show camera input and modes
Why: To see what inputs to do next and other data

Name: Arduino Zero 2 W
Description: The Microcontroller that will control all functions of the minigame as well as logic.
Why: To control the whole camera and logic

Name: Half Breadboard
Description: A module used to have extra ports and have more leeway in circuit connections
Why: For extra ports to connect GND and PWR and other wires too.

Name: Dupont Female-Female Wires
Description: Used to connect modules to microcontroller and circuits.
Why: Bruh, so the whole thing can get some electricity.

Name: 3D Printer Enclousure.
Description: The host for all modules necessary in the build
Why: To put all of the modules into one area
Link: can print through hackclub or by yourself with step file

Name: Sony IMX576 24MP Camera
Description: A module that uses photons to create an image (a camera)
Why: So the camera becomes a camera

Name: Ribbon Flex Extension Cables for Pi Zero&W
Why: So the IMX576 can connect to the Rasberry Pi Zero 2W

Name: USB C connector
Description: A module in which a usb C port is included
Why: For easy connectivity for the camera for data and power.

Name: PCB
Description: A electrical component custom made for a specific task
Why: For the buttons up top to connect to the rasberry PI Zero.
